hero.tagline: Qopheessitoonni Full Stack | Ogeeyyii AI, LLM & Automation | Apps Web, Mobile & Desktop
hero.title: Egeree Ijaaraa jirra
hero.description: AfriDev irratti, dhaabbileen jalqabaa fi gareewwan teeknooloojii teeknooloojii ammayyaa fayyadamuun aplikeeshiniiwwan guddachuu danda'an, raawwii olaanaa qaban akka ijaaratan gargaarra. Apps weebii fi moobayilaa irraa kaasee hanga walitti makamuu AI fi DevOpsitti, yaada walxaxaa gara furmaata dijitaalaa sirrii ta'etti jijjiirra.

fullstack.title: Guddinaa Web Full-Stack
fullstack.description: Teeknooloojii ammayyaa fayyadamuun apps weebii raawwii olaanaa qaban ijaari.

mobile.title: Guddinaa App Mobile
mobile.description: Flutter fi FlutterFlow fayyadamuun apps moobayilaa bareedaa, raawwii olaanaa qaban iOS fi Android irratti uumi.

desktop.title: Guddinaa Aplikeeshinii Desktop
desktop.description: Aplikeeshiniiwwan desktop cimoo Windows, macOS, fi Linux platforms irratti salphaatti hojjetan ijaari.

ai.title: Apps AI fi Walitti Makamuu
ai.description: ChatGPT, LLMs dhuunfaa, fi automation AI oomishaawwan keessanitti makaa muuxannoo fayyadamaa hubataa ta'eef.

cloud.title: Cloud fi DevOps
cloud.description: Bu'uura AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, fi pipelines CI/CD aplikeeshiniiwwan cloud-native guddachuu danda'aniif.

consulting.title: Gorsa fi Fooyyessuu
consulting.description: Qajeelfama teeknikaa, fooyyessuu raawwii, fi dizaayinii arkiteekcharii aplikeeshiniiwwan ammayyaaf.

whyChoose.title: Maaliif AfriDev Filadhaa
whyChoose.subtitle: Pirojektii hunda keessatti gahumsa kennuuf kutannoo qabna

detailOriented.title: Bal'inaan Xiyyeeffannoo
detailOriented.description: Furmaata qulqullaa'e, cimaa fi guddachuu danda'u kennina

communication.title: Walqunnamtii Ifa Ta'e
communication.description: Fooyya'iinsi guyyaa guyyaa fi gamaaggama sprint odeeffannoo sirridduu argachuu si gargaara

exceeding.title: Abdii Caalu
exceeding.description: Galma maamilaa caaluu fi itti quufinsa yeroo dheeraa mirkaneessuu galma keenya

partnership.title: Yaada Hirmaannaa
partnership.description: Mul'anni kee ergama keenya ta'a; milkaa'ina keetiif kutannoo qabna

portfolio.title: Portfolio Keenya
portfolio.subtitle: Hojii fi seenaa milkaa'inaa keenya gaarii agarsiisaa

testimonials.title: Maamiltonni Keenya Maal Jedhu
testimonials.subtitle: Dhaabbileen jalqabaa fi gareewwan teeknooloojii addunyaa irraa amanamu

team.title: Garee Keenya Beekaa
team.subtitle: Ogeeyyii muuxannoo qaban milkaa'ina keessaniif of kennaniiru

contact.title: Waliin Haa Hojjannu
contact.subtitle: Pirojektii keessan hubachuuf gorsa daqiiqaa 30 bilisaa argachuuf qophaa'uu
contact.name: Maqaa Keessan
contact.subject: Mata-duree
contact.success: Ergaan milkaa'inaan ergamee jira! Dafanii isinitti deebina.
contact.error: Ergaa erguu hin dandeenye. Maaloo irra deebi'ii yaali.
